utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes keys for all 7. Now check full specification details per item: 1) destination: provided and specific (Prague, Czech Republic) – fully specified. 2) travel_dates: provided but as "June 20th to June 24th"; this is 4 nights/5 days ambiguity is acceptable, dates are specific – fully specified. 3) transportation: format requires flight details with costs. Provided: "Round-trip flights from Paris for 4 adults" and cost €480. Missing airline, flight numbers, times; however the format only mandates "flight details with costs"—the description counts as details; considered sufficiently specified – fully specified. 4) accommodation: requires hotel selection with costs. Provided: "Two rooms at the Artistic Abode (4 nights)" and cost €760. Lacks address or exact hotel info; but a hotel selection name and cost are present – fully specified. 5) activities: selected activities with costs. Two activities listed each with a name and cost – fully specified. 6) additional_services: requires any extra services with costs. They provided null, which is acceptable as none – counts as included but arguably still specified (none). 7) total_budget: complete cost breakdown. Provided as a single total "€1,600"; does not break down components in this field, but costs for transport, accommodation, activities are itemized above, and the total aggregates them, so it satisfies the total budget requirement – fully specified. Therefore, all 7/7 items are included and sufficiently specified per the given format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes: destination Prague, Czech Republic; transportation as round-trip flights (class unspecified, map to standard categories not possible), accommodation at Artistic Abode; activities: City Walking Tour and Fine Dining Experience. From the ground-truth ratings: Prague, Czech Republic has rating 4. Artistic Abode has rating 3. City Walking Tour has rating 9. Fine Dining Experience appears both under activities (rating 9) and restaurants (rating 10). The package lists it as an activity, so we should map to the activities rating 9.
